# Jag Mariappan - Executive Portfolio

## About
Jag Mariappan is a Senior Director of Enterprise Operations at Stanford Medicine. He specializes in healthcare operations, AI systems leadership, enterprise governance, and digital transformation across large organizations.

## Expertise
- Healthcare Operations
- AI Systems
- Enterprise Governance
- Digital Transformation
- Portfolio Management
- Cross Functional Execution
- Vendor Management
- Operational Strategy
- AI Governance

## Leadership Philosophy
- Clarity reduces friction
- Cadence creates alignment
- Decision quality defines outcomes

## Current Roles
- Stanford Medicine: Senior Director, Enterprise Operations (VP-Equivalent)
- Leading enterprise-scale portfolios spanning digital health, AI-enabled patient experience, and data/security governance

## Ventures & Exits
- Bairo Healthcare: Founder & CEO (Sold)
- VerityAxis: Co-Founder (Sold)
- PrismOS: Chief Operating Officer (Live)
- PodoraHQ: Chief Product Officer (Live)
- AxiomAppeals: Executive Advisor (Live)
- AXIVA: Founder (Live) - https://axiva.ai/
- Medhara: Founder (Live) - https://medhara.axiomappeals.com/

## AI Products Built
- AXIVA: Executive Narrative Engineering Platform
- Medhara: Evidence-Driven Healthcare Search and Clinical Intelligence
- FocusDay: AI productivity tool
- PrismOS: Clinical decision support platform
- Podora: AI-powered decision platform
- AxiomAppeals: Healthcare revenue cycle platform

## Frameworks Used
- Operational clarity
- Execution cadence
- AI governance structures
- Cross-functional decision systems
- Enterprise portfolio discipline

- From Device to Platform: The Institutional Shift
- Governance Architecture as Competitive Advantage
- The Operator's Case for AI Doctrine
